div1.entryFree: Bergomask: a B. dance, Mids. V, 360. Mids. V, 360 Nares: "a rustic dance, framed in imitation of the people of Bergamasco, a province in the state of Venice, who are ridiculed as being more clownish in their manners and dialect than any other people in Italy. All the Italian buffoons imitate them."
